Additional description: Permanent Meadows Farm - representative of farms located in the Po plain where the cattle were fed principally with forage, compound feed and small quantities of alfalfa and corn feed, without silage feed and protein ingredients. Therefore, the milk produced is commonly known as “hay milk”, destined to produce Grana Padano cheese as well.
